set.name: TGS
set.longname: Tales from the Grave in Space

card.name: A Queen is Waiting
card.text: (Spend a different color of mana on each {Vp}.) This card is all colors. As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Search your library for a creature card with mana value X or less, where X is 2 plus the sacrificed creature's number of colors. Put that card on to the battlefield, then shuffle. Exile A Queen is Waiting.

card.name: Accept Defeat
card.text: You may sacrifice a creature. Each opponent sacrifices a creature. You draw a card and you lose 1 life for each creature sacrificed this way.

card.name: Acceptance
card.text: Put target nonland permanent on top of its owner's library. Proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: Acewing Striker
card.text: Flying Compete (Whenever you attack, you get a score counter. Spend six score counters as a sorcery to create Trophy tokens.) Whenever you get a score counter, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Adversary's Navigator
card.text: {1}, Sacrifice this creature: Choose up to one target permanent card not named Adversary's Navigator in your graveyard that was put there from the battlefield this turn. Return it to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Aggressive Hazard
card.text: When this creature enters, choose one — • It fights target token creature an opponent controls. • Destroy target noncreature token.

card.name: Al, the Second Chance
card.text: When Al enters, create two Chance tokens. (They're enchantments with “If you would roll a die, you may sacrifice this and roll that many dice plus one, and ignore a result.”) {4}{R}: Transform Al. Activate only as a sorcery. --- Transforms into Al, the World Mind

card.name: Al, the World Mind
card.text: Flying Al has indestructible as long as you've rolled a die this turn. {U/R}{U/R}: Roll a d6. Search your library for a card with mana value equal to the result, exile it, then shuffle. You may cast the exiled card without paying its mana cost this turn. --- Transforms from Al, the Second Chance

card.name: Al's Experiment
card.text: Flying This creature can't block. {1}{B}: Roll a d6. If you roll a 6, return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Otherwise, return this card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Al's Illusion
card.text: ({T}: Add {U}.) This land enters tapped. {5}{U}{U}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Draw three cards.

card.name: Al's Reward
card.text: {T}: Add {U} or {R}. {2}{U}{U}{R}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw three cards.

card.name: Al's Trial
card.text: Flash Compete (Whenever you attack, you get a score counter. Spend six score counters as a sorcery to create Trophy tokens.) Other nonland permanents lose all abilities as long as this enchantment entered this turn.

card.name: Anvy, Thorns of Sefol
card.text: At the beginning of your combat, you may choose one — • Target noncreature permanent you control becomes a 3/3 green Treefolk creature. (It loses its other colors and types. This effect lasts indefinitely.) • Create a token that's a copy of target Treefolk you control, except it's a 3/3 green Treefolk creature. --- Transforms into Anvy's Last Hope

card.name: Anvy's Last Hope
card.text: Legacy (You may play this side of this card only from your graveyard. Exile it if it would be put into a graveyard or not resolve.) Enchant permanent you control Enchanted permanent is a 3/3 green Dryad Spirit creature with “At the beginning of combat on your turn, create a copy of enchanted permanent except it's a 3/3 green Treefolk creature.” --- Transforms from Anvy, Thorns of Sefol

card.name: Api, the First Thought
card.text: Api is all colors. When Api enters, you may search your library for a land card and put it into your hand. {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}: Transform Api. Activate only as a sorcery. --- Transforms into Api, the World Seed

card.name: Api, the World Seed
card.text: Indestructible As long as it's your turn, lands you control have indestructible and haste. {T}: Untap up to three lands you control. They become 1/1 Spirit creatures with flying that are still lands until end of turn. --- Transforms from Api, the First Thought

card.name: Api's Assessor
card.text: (Spend a different color of mana on each {Vp}.) This creature is all colors. Flying When this creature enters, return up to one target artifact card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. If you don't, draw a card. Whenever one or more creatures you control attack, untap up to that many artifacts you control.

card.name: Api's Blessing
card.text: Look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal a multicolored or land card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Api's Chosen
card.text: (Spend a different color of mana on each {Vp}.) This creature is all colors. Whenever you cast a multicolored spell, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Then if you've spent {W}{U}{B}{R}{G} to cast spells this turn, this creature gains flying and lifelink until end of turn.

card.name: Api's Reward
card.text: This Trophy is all colors. {T}: Add one mana of any color {2}{Vp}{Vp}{Vp}{Vp}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw three cards.

card.name: Api's Trial
card.text: (Spend a different color of mana on each {Vp}.) This enchantment is all colors. Compete (Whenever you attack, you get a score counter. Spend six score counters as a sorcery to create Trophy tokens.) At the beginning of your end step, if you've spent three or more different colors of mana this turn, draw a card. Then if you've spent five or more, proliferate twice.

card.name: Api's Wish
card.text: (Spend a different color of mana on each {Vp}.) Api's Wish is all colors. You may reveal a multicolored card you own from outside the game and put it into your hand. Exile Api's Wish.

card.name: Arcane Rallier
card.text: Compete (Whenever you attack, you get a score counter. Spend six score counters as a sorcery to create Trophy tokens.) If you control a Trophy, other creatures you control have hexproof. Otherwise, other creatures you control have ward {X}, where X is the number of score counters you have.

card.name: Arena Boss
card.text: Compete (Whenever you attack, you get a score counter. Spend six score counters as a sorcery to create Trophy tokens.) At the beginning of your upkeep, create a 1/1 white Warrior creature token. If you control a Trophy, create three of those tokens instead.

card.name: Arena for the Fallen
card.text: {T}: Create a 1/1 white and black Spirit Warrior creature token. It can't block this turn. Activate only if a creature died this turn. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice a creature: Draw a card.

card.name: Ascendancy
card.text: Whenever you attack, put an ascend counter on this enchantment. Creatures you control get +X/+X, where X is the number of ascend counters on this enchantment.

card.name: Aspire
card.text: Aspire is all colors. Target creature gets +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the number of colors among permanents you control. --- Transforms into Achieve

card.name: Achieve
card.text: Legacy (You may play this side of this card only from your graveyard. Exile it if it would be put into a graveyard or not resolve.) Target creature can't be blocked this turn. Untap it. After this main phase, there is an additional combat phase followed by an additional main phase. --- Transforms from Aspire

card.name: Assassin's Trophy
card.text: Destroy target permanent an opponent controls. Its controller may search their library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: At Odds Gate
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, create a Chance token. (It's an enchantment with “If you would roll a die, you may sacrifice this and roll that many dice plus one, and ignore a result.”) Whenever you sacrifice a Chance, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.

card.name: Attention Grab
card.text: Tap X target creatures. Put a stun counter on each of those creatures. Islandcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for an Island card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Ba, the Sixth Sense
card.text: When Ba enters, exile the top three cards of your library, you may play one of those cards until the end of your next turn. {4}{W}: Transform Ba. Activate only as a sorcery. --- Transforms into Ba, the World Father

card.name: Ba, the World Father
card.text: Trample, haste Whenever Ba attacks, it gains lifelink and indestructible until end of turn. Then exile the top card of your library. You may play cards exiled with Ba as long as you've attacked this turn. --- Transforms from Ba, the Sixth Sense

card.name: Ba's Arena
card.text: ({T}: Add {R}.) This land enters tapped. {3}{R}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Exile the top two cards of your library. You may play those cards until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Ba's Prodigy
card.text: Compete (Whenever you attack, you get a score counter. Spend six score counters as a sorcery to create Trophy tokens.) During your turn, this creature has first strike. Whenever you attack, create a tapped and attacking 1/1 white Warrior creature token. At the end of combat, if you don't control a Trophy, exile that token.

card.name: Ba's Reward
card.text: {T}: Add {R} or {W}. {2}{R}{R}{W}{W}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw three cards.

card.name: Ba's Trial
card.text: Compete (Whenever you attack, you get a score counter. Spend six score counters as a sorcery to create Trophy tokens.) At the beginning of combat on your turn, target creature you control gains double strike until end of turn.

card.name: Barren Desolation
card.text: As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, this land enters tapped. {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Plains or Swamp card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Battle Medic
card.text: When this creature enters, you may return target creature or battle card not named Battle Medic with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Bitter History
card.text: Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. If a creature died under your control this turn, that creature gets -4/-4 until end of turn instead.

card.name: Blast Area
card.text: (As a Challenge enters, choose an opponent to protect it. You and others can attack it. When it's defeated, exile it, then cast it transformed for free.) At the beginning of your first main phase, remove two defense counters from this battle. --- Transforms into Supreme Blast

card.name: Supreme Blast
card.text: This spell can't be countered. Supreme Blast deals 4 damage to each creature. --- Transforms from Blast Area

card.name: Bound as Brothers
card.text: Compete (Whenever you attack, you get a score counter. Spend six score counters as a sorcery to create Trophy tokens.) When this enchantment enters, create X 1/1 white Warrior creature tokens.

card.name: Bringer of Bad Luck
card.text: Ward {2} If a spell, triggered ability or activated ability you control would cause you to roll a die, copy that spell or ability, except the result is 1 rather than rolling a die. You may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Brood Hunter
card.text: If a card would be put into a graveyard from anywhere, instead that card is revealed and put on the bottom of its owner's library.

card.name: Brood Infiltrator
card.text: Flying {Vp}{Vp}{Vp}: Mill two cards. You may return a card milled this way from your graveyard to your hand. (Spend a different color of mana on each {Vp}.)

card.name: Brood Rivalbreaker
card.text: Whenever you attack, you may sacrifice a creature. When you do, this creature deals X damage to target player, where X is this creature's power. If the sacrificed creature was an Insect, this creature deals X damage to any target instead.

card.name: Brood War
card.text: As this enchantment enters, choose Grist or Cenari. • Grist — If an effect would create one or more tokens under your control, it creates twice that many of those tokens instead. • Cenari — If an effect would put one or more counters on a you or a permanent you control, it puts twice that many of those counters on that permanent instead.

card.name: Brutal Victory
card.text: Compete (Whenever you attack, you get a score counter. Spend six score counters as a sorcery to create Trophy tokens.) When this enchantment enters, if it was cast, an opponent chooses a creature you control. Then destroy all other creatures.

card.name: Burning Desire

Enchanted creature gets +X/+0, where X is the highest result you've rolled this turn. {2}{R}: Roll a d6. Enchanted creature gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Buzz Off
card.text: Buzz Off deals 4 damage to any nonplayer target. Create a number of 1/1 red Insect creature tokens equal to the excess damage dealt this way. Those tokens can't block this turn.

card.name: Catch the Show
card.text: Exile any number of target nonland permanents you control that share a single card type. Return them to the battlefield under your control. Plainscycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Cenari, the World Hand
card.text: Reach Cenari has indestructible as long as you control at least two other Insects. Whenever another Insect enters the battlefield under your control, each opponent loses life equal to that creatures power. --- Transforms from Cenari, the Fifth Desire

card.name: Cenari's Brood
card.text: When this creature enters, you gain 1 life for each creature card in your graveyard. Swampcycling {2}, forestcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Swamp or Forest card, reveal it, and put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Spiteful Prankster
card.text: During your turn, Spiteful Prankster has first strike.\nWhenever another creature dies, Spiteful Prankster deals 1 damage to target player or planeswalker.

card.name: Stampeding Gorejaw
card.text: When Stampeding Gorejaw enters, create three Hunt battle tokens an opponent protects with 2 defense and “When this battle is defeated, create a 3/3 green Elemental creature token.”\nWhenever you sacrifice a creature, it deals damage equal to its power to up to one target battle.

card.name: Standard of the Risen Blade
card.text: When Standard of the Risen Blade enters, return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield, then attach Standard of the Risen Blade to it.\nEquipped creature gets +1/+1.\nEquip {2}

card.name: Steal the Name
card.text: As Steal the Name enters, each opponent reveals half the cards in their hand, rounded down. Then choose a nonland card name.\nSpells with the chosen name can't be cast.

card.name: Steel Never Sleeps
card.text: This spell costs {1}{R} less to cast if it has a single target.\nUntap any number of target equipped and/or artifact creatures you control. After this main phase, there is an additional combat phase followed by an additional main phase.

card.name: Steward of Hollowood
card.text: Trample\nWhenever Steward of Hollowood enters or you defeat a battle, create a 3/3 green Elemental creature token.

card.name: Stillmouth Wretch
card.text:
Flying
When Stillmouth Wretch enters, choose one —
• Create a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment artifact with equip {2} and “Equipped creature gets +1/+1.”)
• Create a Hunt battle token an opponent protects with 2 defense and “When this battle is defeated, draw a card.”

card.name: Stillness Reclaimed
card.text: Destroy all artifacts and enchantments with mana value 3 or less. You gain 1 life for each permanent destroyed this way.

card.name: Stiltwalker Husk
card.text: When Stiltwalker Husk enters, create a 1/1 green Human creature token, then attach Stiltwalker Husk to it.\nEquipped creature gets +4/+4 and has reach.\nEquip {6}

card.name: Stitched Witness
card.text: As Stitched Witness enters the battlefield, create X Weapon tokens. Stitched Witness enters the battlefield with those tokens attached to it.\nWhen Stitched Witness dies, you may equip any number of Equipment attached to it to any other creatures you control.

card.name: Strayhorn Guide
card.text: Whenever you defeat a battle, you may search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.\n{5}{G}{G}: Creatures you control get +2/+2 and gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: Strike True
card.text: Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control.\nMetalcraft — The creature you control gets +2/+2 until end of turn before it fights if you control three or more artifacts.

card.name: Strike of Conviction
card.text: Presence 3 (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap three untapped lands, artifacts, and/or creatures you control.)\nStrike of Conviction deals 5 damage to any target. If a creature or planeswalker dealt damage this way would die this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: Sunlit Execution
card.text: Sunlit Execution deals 2 damage to target attacking or blocking creature. You gain 2 life.

card.name: Sunveil Seraph
card.text: Flying\nIf you would gain life, you may gain life equal to Sunveil Seraph's power instead.\nIf an opponent would lose life, you may have that player lose life equal to Sunveil Seraph's power instead. (Combat damage is one instance of losing life.)

card.name: Sunward Spear
card.text: When Sunward Spear enters, create a Hunt battle token an opponent protects with 2 defense and “When this battle is defeated, create a 4/4 white Angel creature token with flying.”\nEquipped creature gets +2+0 and has flying.\nEquip {2}

card.name: Sworn Departure
card.text: Exile target artifact, creature, or planeswalker. Its controller creates a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment artifact with equip {2} and “Equipped creature gets +1/+1.”)

card.name: Tender Patchbinder
card.text: Metalcraft — At the beginning of combat on your turn, target artifact you control becomes a 0/0 Construct creature with “This creature gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control.” This effect lasts until end of turn unless you control three or more artifacts. (Then it lasts indefinitely.)

card.name: Tharnholt Invoker
card.text: Creatures you control have “Whenever this creature becomes tapped for the first time each turn, if it isn't being declared as an attacker, create a 1/1 green Human creature token.”\n{3}{U}, {T}: Draw a card.

card.name: The Flames Know Guilt
card.text: All damage dealt to creatures your opponents control is dealt as though its source had wither. (Damage is dealt to creatures in the form of -1/-1 counters.)\nWhen The Flames Know Guilt enters, it deals 4 damage to any target.

card.name: The Frozen Gaol
card.text: When The Frozen Gaol enters, create four Hunt battle tokens an opponent protects with 2 defense and “When this battle is defeated, mill four cards.”\nWhen you have 20 or more cards in your graveyard, transform The Frozen Gaol. --- Transforms into Virelen of Severed Malice

card.name: Virelen of Severed Malice
card.text: Ward—Pay 7 life.\nTrample, lifelink\nWhenever you gain life, return up to one target creature card with mana value X or less from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it, where X is the amount of life gained. --- Transforms from The Frozen Gaol

card.name: The Quiet Gallop
card.text: Destroy all creatures and tokens.

card.name: The Road Made Real
card.text: Exile the top two cards of your library. You may play them until the end of your next turn.\nCreate a Treasure token and a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment artifact with equip {2} and “Equipped creature gets +1/+1.”)

card.name: The Thirsting Pane
card.text: When The Thirsting Pane enters, attach The Thirsting Pane to target creature you don't control and gain control of it for as long as The Thirsting Pane is attached to it. Tap that creature and put three stun counters on it.\nEquipped creature gets +2/+1 and has “Whenever this creature attacks, draw a card.”\nEquip {3}

card.name: Thornroot Maiden
card.text: Menace\nWither (This deals damage to creatures in the form of -1/-1 counters.)

card.name: Thought Harvest
card.text: Mill four cards. You may return a creature or land card milled this way into your hand. If you control a creature with power 4 or greater, instead you may put a creature card and a land card milled this way into your hand.

card.name: Threadcharmer's Boots
card.text: Equipped creature gets +2/+1 and has “Whenever this creature attacks, you may attach an Equipment you control to it.”\nEquip {3}

card.name: Threadsnare Hag
card.text: Wither (This deals damage to creatures in the form of -1/-1 counters.)\nDuring your turn, Threadsnare Hag has first strike.

card.name: Thrust Beyond the Shard
card.text: This spell can't be countered.\nExile target creature or planeswalker and its controller's graveyard.

card.name: Tidings Carried on Ash
card.text: Create a Hunt battle token an opponent protects with 2 defense and “When this battle is defeated, create a 4/4 red Dragon creature token with flying.”\nDraw two cards.

card.name: Tidy Blessing
card.text: Exile target artifact, battle, or enchantment.

card.name: Tiller of Realms
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. If Tiller of Realms is equipped to a creature, add {C}{C} instead.\nEquipped creature gets +3/+3.\nEquip {5}

card.name: Tithe of Flesh
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if you've sacrificed one or more permanents this turn, you may search your library for a permanent card with mana value equal to or less than the number of permanents you've sacrificed this turn, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Trinket Seeker
card.text: When Trinket Seeker enters, create a colorless artifact token named Twiddlebox with “{U}, {T}: Tap or untap another target nonland permanent. Activate only outside of combat.”\nWhenever Trinket Seeker deals combat damage to a player or noncreature permanent, you may draw a card. If you do, discard a card.

card.name: Troubling Mischief
card.text: Create two 1/1 green Ouphe creature tokens with wither. Until end of turn, creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain haste. (The tokens deal damage to creatures in the form of -1/-1 counters.)

card.name: Tuckered-Out Domovoi
card.text: {T}, Tap an untapped creature you control: Tap target creature.

card.name: Twilight Warden
card.text: Twilight Warden has first strike as long as it is attacking.\nMetalcraft — When Twilight Warden enters, if you control three or more artifacts, you may exile target creature.

card.name: Unbidden Patron
card.text: Whenever you gain life, put that many alms counters on Unbidden Patron.\n{B}, Remove two alms counters from Unbidden Patron: You draw a card and you lose 1 life.\n{B}, Remove seven alms counters from Unbidden Patron: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Undertow Vodnik
card.text: Undertow Vodnik can't be blocked by equipped creatures.\n{U}, Discard this card: Target creature you control gains hexproof until end of turn.

card.name: Unintended Transit
card.text: Exile up to one target artifact card from your graveyard and the top two cards of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play those cards.

card.name: Unyielding Witness
card.text: Reach\nUnyielding Witness can't have counters placed on it.

card.name: Urgent Summons
card.text: Presence 2 (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap two untapped lands, artifacts, and/or creatures you control.)\nSearch your library for an Aura, Equipment, or legendary card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Vakhter's Edge
card.text: When Vakhter's Edge enters, you may attach it to target creature you control. When you do, target creature can't block this turn.\nEquipped creature gets +1/+1 and has haste.\nEquip {3}

card.name: Vakhter Conscriptor
card.text: Whenever Vakhter Conscriptor becomes tapped, exile up to one target card from a graveyard.\nAt the beginning of your end step, if there are three or more cards exiled by Vakhter Conscriptor, create a 1/1 green Human creature token.

card.name: Veilbound Nocnitsa
card.text: Flying\nWither (This deals damage to creatures in the form of -1/-1 counters.)\nWhen Veilbound Nocnitsa enters, all other creatures get -2/-2 until end of turn.

card.name: Veilshroud Crossing
card.text: Veilshroud Crossing enters tapped.\n{T}: Add {W} or {U}. --- Transforms into Veilshroud Harrower

card.name: Veilshroud Harrower
card.text: Whenever Veilshroud Harrower attacks, tap up to one target creature. If that creature was already tapped, put a stun counter on it. --- Transforms from Veilshroud Crossing

card.name: Velkora Marshal
card.text: When Velkora Marshal enters, create a Treasure token and a Hunt battle token an opponent protects with 2 defense and “When this battle is defeated, draw a card.”

card.name: Vesnara, She Who Bloomed
card.text: Flying\nWhenever Vesnara, She Who Bloomed attacks, mill three cards. When you do, return target Equipment card from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter it. It becomes a 2/2 Scarecrow artifact creature. Change its text by replacing all instances of “Equipped creature” with “This creature.”

card.name: Vespermaw
card.text: Menace\n{2}{R}, Exile Vespermaw from your hand: Draw a card, then create a Hunt battle token an opponent protects with 2 defense and “When this battle is defeated, create a token that's a copy of Vespermaw.”

card.name: Vesselbound Maw
card.text: Whenever Vesselbound Maw attacks, you may sacrifice a creature. If you do, Vesselbound Maw can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less this turn.

card.name: Veyhalde Emberhold
card.text: When Veyhalde Emberhold enters, create a Hunt battle token an opponent protects with 2 defense and “When this battle is defeated, draw a card.”\nWhenever you defeat a battle, Veyhalde Emberhold deals 3 damage to the player protecting it.

card.name: Veyhalde Liaison
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, for each opponent that is protecting two or fewer battles, create a Hunt battle token that opponent protects with 2 defense and “When this battle is defeated, draw a card.”\nWhenever Veyhalde Liaison attacks, for each battle defending player protects, create a 1/1 green Human creature token that's tapped and attacking that battle.

card.name: Vice, Between Spaces
card.text:
Whenever you activate one of Vice's loyalty abilities, create a Hunt battle token an opponent protects with 2 defense with that ability, except it's a triggered ability with “When this battle is defeated,”
[+1]: Create a Treasure token.
[-3]: Create a 0/0 colorless Construct artifact creature token with “This creature gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control.”
[-4]: Create a token that's a copy of target nonlegendary artifact you control.

card.name: Vigil of Those Lost
card.text: When Vigil of Those Lost enters, create a Weapon token. (It's an Equipment artifact with equip {2} and “Equipped creature gets +1/+1.”)\n{1}, {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Virelen's Call
card.text: Presence X (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped lands, artifacts, and/or creatures you control.)\nReturn any number of creature cards with total mana value X or less from your graveyard to the battlefield under your control.

card.name: Virelen's Skull
card.text:
Equipped creature gets +2/+0 and has deathtouch.
Whenever equipped creature deals combat damage to a player, choose one that hasn't been chosen. If you can't, that player loses the game.
• That player discards a card.
• That player sacrifices a creature.
• You gain 3 life.
Equip {2}

card.text: Whenever Voice of the Rimed Path becomes tapped, you gain 1 life and scry 1.

card.text:

Flying

{G}: Wailing Songbeast gets +1/+0 and gains deathtouch until end of turn. Activate only once each turn.

card.text: Choose one —\n• Put three -1/-1 counters on target creature.\n• Each opponent sacrifices an enchantment and loses 3 life.

card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, you may create a token that's a copy of target Equipment you control. card.text: Whenever Warden of the Rimed Oath becomes tapped, put a stun counter on target nonland permanent you don't control.

card.name: Wax and Woe
card.text: You may sacrifice an artifact or creature. If you do, create two tokens that are copies of that permanent, except they have haste. At the beginning of your next end step, sacrifice one of them.\nExile Wax and Woe.

card.name: Wayfarer's Map
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+0 and has “Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player or noncreature permanent, you may search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.”\nEquip {2}

card.name: Wayward Elder
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice a permanent, Wayward Elder deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Weeping Cikavac
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each 1 life you've gained this turn.\nFlying\nWhen Weeping Cikavac enters, destroy target nonland permanent.

card.name: Where the Wind Begins
card.text: Create a Hunt battle token an opponent protects with 2 defense and “When this battle is defeated, draw two cards.” You can't attack it this turn.

card.name: Whisper of Stillness
card.text: Reveal the top six cards of your library. You may put any number of cards that each share a name into your hand and the rest into your graveyard.

card.name: Whisperfoot Skitterer
card.text: Reach\nWhen Whisperfoot Skitterer dies, create a Hunt battle token an opponent protects with 2 defense and “When this battle is defeated, search your library for a card named Whisperfoot Skitterer, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.”

card.name: Whitehoof Ascendant
card.text: Whitehoof Ascendant has indestructible as long as you have gained life this turn. (Your in combat lifelink creatures can save it.)

card.name: Will Away
card.text: Presence X (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap X untapped lands, artifacts, and/or creatures you control.)\nCounter target spell unless its controller pays {X}.

card.name: Wilt Like the Others
card.text: Destroy target creature or planeswalker with one or more counters on it.

card.name: Winter's Rebuke
card.text: Presence 2 (As an additional cost to cast this spell, tap two untapped lands, artifacts, and/or creatures you control.)\nTap all creatures your opponents control, then put a stun counter on each of those creatures.

card.text: Vigilance, reach\nWhen Witch's Spine enters, create a Hunt battle token with 2 defense an opponent protects and “When this battle is defeated, draw a card.”

card.name: Witch of the Mirepaths
card.text: Wither (This deals damage to creatures in the form of -1/-1 counters.)\nWhen Witch of the Mirepaths dies, you may put a -1/-1 counter on target creature.

card.name: Woundlace Doll
card.text: When Woundlace Doll enters, create a 2/2 red Human creature token, then attach Woundlace Doll to it.\nEquipped creature gets +1/+1 and has wither. (This deals damage to creatures in the form of -1/-1 counters.)\nEquip {3}

card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+1, has trample, and has “Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it. When you do, destroy target artifact or enchantment that player controls.”\nEquip {3}

card.text: Wreathrot Crossing enters tapped.\n{T}: Add {B} or {R}. --- Transforms into Wreathrot Husk
